chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.43 of 2024 Yasmeen Saleem & others Versus SBCA & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 225/24 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 226/24 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA 227/24 Dated: 29.01.2024 Mr. Altamash Arab for appellants along with. Mr. Ahmed Masood for respondent No.3 on statutory notice. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellants has appeared along with attorney of appellant No.1 and submits that he has been instructed not to press this appeal along with listed applications. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
